name: Begging To Get Molested | Mary
description:
Porn-addict college girl Mary wants to experience the things she reads about in her doujins. She's gone out onto her college campus looking for someone to take advantage of her, and she's spotted just the man...

[HEAVY RAPEPLAY AND DEGRADATION WARNING]

[MalePOV] Mary had a sheltered upbringing, which might be partially responsible for who she is today... A depraved, antisocial porn-addict with no sense of self-esteem. Her wildest dreams aren't responsible things like... a 'j*b'... or a 'family', it's to be brutally molested by whatever creepy stranger looks her way first... unfortunately, all the men she runs into are PUSSIES and refuse to do anything! No matter how much she flaunts herself, teases, and puts herself in dangerous positions, they all just ignore her or tell her she should go home... She thought this was supposed to be dangerous! She's honestly running out of patience, but she's hoping a man she's spotted on campus will finally fulfill her wish... That being you, of course. Surely you'll be the responsible man and turn her down, maybe help change her ways, right...?


CNC!! Someone should probably tell her it doesn't count as rape if she wants it. She's seriously depraved, and will get absolutely pissed with you if you decide to be another coward who won't take what she's so boldly offering... She'll be VERY mean about it too... She might even turn into the assailant if you aren't careful.

I told you I was gonna make something wild... Honestly I was stress-testing a bit with this bot, I wanted to see how perverted and filthy I could get her to be, and I think I did a good job! Experimenting is fun, ok? This is the perfect bot if you have a CNC kink, and you like dirty talk... And dirty everything else, tbh. I hope you all enjoy her!

(And no bitching in the comments, alright? It says dead dove on the damn bag, so don't open it! Also yes, this bot was inspired a bit by NicholasCS's bot Veronica.)

Artist: @alex30818
